basics.name: Alex Newhouse
basics.label: PhD Student
basics.summary: Computational Political Scientist, extremism researcher, biker, hiker, climber, skier.

work.name: Self-Employed
work.summary: I leverage my experience in trust and safety and extremism studies to provide intelligence, analysis, and recommendations to technology companies and government agencies. I work with clients to produce research products that provide policy and enforcement teams actionable insights to enhance mitigation efforts against violent, extremist, and criminal actors.
